name: Sewer Soda
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the chocolate ice cream into tall glasses until they are about halfway full.
2. Pour or squeeze about 3 tablespoons of chocolate syrup into each glass.
3. Slowly fill the rest of the glasses almost to the top with club soda, stirring well with a spoon.
4. Serve with a straw and a tall spoon for enjoying the brown lumps.
5. (Optional) Add an unwrapped Tootsie Roll to each glass for extra disgust factor.
Serves 4 sewer soda enthusiasts.
